data.content:
## Implementation Plan

1. Modified `resolve_knot_token()` in `src/app.rs` to handle partial hierarchical aliases
2. When a token contains dots (e.g., "ba0e.2"), the prefix before the first dot is matched against knot suffixes
3. The matching full ID is combined with the dot-tail to form a full alias, which is then looked up
4. Added 3 tests: happy path, invalid child index (NotFound), unknown prefix (passthrough)
5. Coverage: 95.08%
